data.content: Planning complete. Proposed split: (1) reusable Loom compat harness, (2) thin `kno loom compat-test` CLI surface with smoke/matrix and JSON/text outputs, (3) tests/diagnostics/cleanup coverage. Critical revision from prior review: add an explicit failure-path runtime/API seam, because current code parses bundle `failure_targets` but only advances via happy-path selection. Cleanup should snapshot/restore repo workflow selection and remove temp-installed workflow artifacts unless `--keep-artifacts` is set.
